case_title: GERMAN MOTORS COLLISTIAN CENTER VS. JIANCHANG XU

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) /AUTH TO APPEAR FILED BY PLAINTIFF GERMAN MOTORS COLLISTIAN CENTER
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-18-2012 - JUDGMENT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFFONLY. KEN PHILLIPS APPEARS ON BEHALF OF PLAINTIFF. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GERMAN MOTORS COLLISTIAN CENTER RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT XU, JIANCHANG $1,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $89.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,089.00, DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,000.00 FILED BY GERMAN MOTORS COLLISTIAN CENTER AS TO DEFENDANT XU, JIANCHANG ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-18-2012 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED MAR-26-2012, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT XU, JIANCHANG
